nodes.name: Manual Trigger (dev)
nodes.notes: Manual trigger for local testing. Production runs normally use the daily schedule.

nodes.name: Daily Schedule (prod)
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 09:00 server time. Adjust schedule and timezone behaviour in n8n for the client environment.

nodes.name: Set Example Invoice Inputs
nodes.notes: Static demo input. Replace with billing-system connector output in a client implementation.

nodes.name: Validate Config / Guardrails
nodes.notes: Validates thresholds, parses invoice payloads and prepares control config before any collection action is prepared.

nodes.name: Fetch Overdue Invoices (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Demo billing-source node. Replace with Stripe, Xero, QuickBooks, NetSuite, Chargebee or HTTP API node using credentials, pagination, timeout and retry handling.

nodes.name: Prepare Billing Source Alerts
nodes.notes: Prepares finance/operations alert payloads when billing data is failed, partial or empty.

nodes.name: Normalise & Filter Invoices
nodes.notes: Filters invoices below threshold, written off invoices and invalid records, then creates idempotency keys for downstream actions.

nodes.name: Prepare Customer Reminders
nodes.notes: Prepares deterministic customer reminder email payloads. In production, connect this to approved email delivery after finance/client review.

nodes.name: Prepare Account Owner Notifications
nodes.notes: Prepares account-owner notification payloads. Replace with Slack, Teams, CRM task or email node for a client deployment.

nodes.name: Prepare Internal Logging Rows
nodes.notes: Prepares durable-log rows. Replace with Sheets, database, Airtable, Notion, Xero/Stripe notes or accounting-system update.

nodes.name: Prepare Escalations
nodes.notes: Prepares escalation payloads for invoices past escalation thresholds. Replace with finance leadership alert, CRM/PM task and billing-system note update.

nodes.name: Prepare Optional LLM Reminder Drafts
nodes.notes: Optional data-minimised prompts for rewriting reminder tone. Do not use LLM output as collections authority.

nodes.name: Merge Reminder + Owner
nodes.notes: Combines branch outputs by position using n8n 2.8.4-compatible merge configuration.

nodes.name: Merge Logging + Escalation
nodes.notes: Combines branch outputs by position using n8n 2.8.4-compatible merge configuration.

nodes.name: Merge Actions
nodes.notes: Combines branch outputs by position using n8n 2.8.4-compatible merge configuration.

nodes.name: Merge Actions + LLM Prompts
nodes.notes: Combines branch outputs by position using n8n 2.8.4-compatible merge configuration.

nodes.name: Build Collections Summary
nodes.notes: Builds daily finance summary with buckets, escalations, source warnings and action failures.

parameters.jsCode:
const source = items[0]?.json ?? {}; const date = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
return [{ json: { ...source, finance_notification: { channel: source.config?.finance_alert_channel ?? '#finance-collections', subject: `Daily collections summary - ${date}`, markdown: source.summary_markdown, idempotency_key: `collections-summary:${date}`, delivery_status: 'prepared_replace_with_slack_teams_or_email_node' } } }];

nodes.name: Prepare Finance Summary Notification
nodes.notes: Prepares finance summary notification payload. Replace with Slack, Teams or Email Send.

nodes.name: Log Audit Snapshot (demo)
nodes.notes: Creates an audit-ready collections run record. Replace or extend with database, Sheets, Drive, Notion, accounting-system notes or object storage.
